name: SCC_RestartInd
title: SCC_RestartInd
description: The callback is called as soon as the vehicle restarts the protocol after a disconnection.
Comment: With SCC_GetRetriesLeft the number of restarts remaining is queried.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of the last SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
